name: MHMT Messenger
description: MHMT Messenger is a fully-featured, native Android chat and messaging application with offline-capable Room persistence, real-time AI contact conversations (via Gemini), voice message recording, simulated direct audio calling, contact list management, group chats, customizable background wallpapers (pre-loaded or gallery), liquid glass (glassmorphism) design elements, dark/light theme, and dynamic English and Persian (RTL) language translation.
